All right guys, JB here. Time for your daily motivation slash skills training. Big one today. Ready for this? Wrapping your package. I mean, honestly, this one just kills me. You know, people, they dress in a way that simply sabotages their own success. Why would you do that guys? Why would you not adhere to the basic philosophy behind all body language? It's just kind of, and I know it's, I don't want to fit in, but if you want to succeed in selling and make that all important impression in those first four seconds, give yourself a leg up. Make it a downhill ride versus an uphill struggle. Remember, you know, I use this metaphor a lot. The book, The Art of War by Sun Tzu. Every battle's won before it's ever fought. Strategic preparation. Now we're going to get into this ad nauseam and prospecting and scripting, right? But I got to say, even with body language, we just prepare. What are you going to wear? How are you going to dress? How are you going to carry yourself? This is everything. If you have any questions about this on this week's Weekly Intensive, be there and ask me a question. That's what these intensives are for. I'm here to help you for the long term guys. I said it's a journey that doesn't end in 12 weeks. This is a journey for a career to turn you into a force of nature to make you an asset to your company, an asset to your family, and have the ability to just really live your life at the highest level. Don't settle for second best. So ask yourself this very simple yet incredibly profound question. How do experts, how do true experts in my field dress? How do they carry themselves? And I want to do that. It's as simple as that. You notice in lesson one, I have a lot of visual exercises, right? Because it's a visual thing by language. But remember this, just remember this all important point that I mentioned it yesterday, but even if you're on the phone, people make a mental image of you based on how you sound. So they're still constructing an image and how you sound is linked to how you look it is. Now, I won't deny, I'm never going to blow smoke up your butt, right? But here's the thing. Of course, I can sound great when I'm dressed in my underwear or I could, for all you know, I can be wearing this and no clothes beneath it. And I could have trained myself over the years to do that. You know, my staff put up a funny visual, we'll be being naked on the day. Don't do that guys, all right? You'll get yours if you do that. But the point is, is that, but I'm like doing this for years. I remember in my early days, I was just getting started, you know, I was naturally adept at this. I just felt more confident. I dressed the right way. There's a certain feeling. How many times have you seen in pop culture or movie? I remember one, the family man, when Nicolas Cage, he goes, there's just something about a suit that makes a man feel like a better man. Same thing goes to the woman. There's something about the right dress of a business, now again, remember that all-important law of congruency. If you're a plumber or an electrician, there's going to be something about wearing that crystal shirt with your name patch that, I mean, it just makes you feel like a success. You lead with your body. Bottom line.
